Class BookingsOverview

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.BookingsOverview
public class BookingsOverview extends Object
Screen Controller for the Bookings Overview screen Shows the list of all bookings and a tab for that booking's events
Version:
1.0 April 6 2025
Author:
Neil Daya

      Returns:
      AnchorPane card containing event information
